# ClientCapabilities.SupportsSamplingContext property

`true` if the client declared the deprecated `sampling.context` sub-flag (§6.2, R-6.2-n). This gates non-`none``includeContext` during sampling (see `CapabilityNegotiation.MayUseIncludeContext`).

```csharp
public bool SupportsSamplingContext { get; }
```
